Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Statistics Archived Stories Summer Camps Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

2 Dyson Riley

  • Position Guard
  • Height 6-2
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown Richardson, Texas
  • Bio
  • Stats

Biography

At Richardson High School:
Joins the Buffs following a standout prep career at Richardson High School (Texas)... Posted 17 points, seven rebounds, two assists, and two steals per game as a senior... First Team All-District for 7-6A under head coach Kevin Lawson... First Team All-City in Richardson for his contributions to the Eagles' team in addition to McDonalds Texas Invitational All-Tournament Team... Also named the Royce City Tourney MVP and Metro City Showcase MVP...

Personal:
Born March 16, 2007... Son of Dante and Fransell Riley and he has one sibling, Sullivan... Majoring in Mechanical Engineering at West Texas A&M...

Statistics

Season Statistics

Season Statistics

No statistics available for this season.

Career Statistics

There are no statistics available for this player.
